title: Walpersia
taxonomy: Walpersia is classified in the family Apocynaceae. This family includes plants commonly known as dogbanes, olives, and periwinkles. Walpersia is further classified in the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. The species is native to South America, particularly in the tropical regions. Further classification may be required to provide a more specific and detailed description of Walpersia.
